fundamentals.name: Astera Labs, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Astera Labs, Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells semiconductor-based connectivity solutions for cloud and AI infrastructure. It offers an intelligent connectivity platform, comprised of semiconductor-based, high-speed, mixed-signal connectivity products that integrate a matrix of microcontrollers and sensors, and COSMOS. The company provides COSMOS software suite, a connectivity system management and optimization software that enables management and optimization of resources for large fleets at cloud-scale via link, fleet, and RAS management capabilities. In addition, it offers PCIe/CXL smart DSP retimers and cable modules; ethernet smart cable modules for cloud and AI infrastructure; CXL memory connectivity controllers; and smart fabric switches. The company serves hyperscalers and system original equipment manufacturers. Astera Labs, Inc. was incorporated in 2017 and is based in San Jose, California.

judgment.summary: Rapidly growing company with high margins and strong analyst conviction, though valuation metrics are stretched.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 13.5%; next earnings date is 2026-08-04.
positives: Revenue growth 93.4% YoY and earnings growth 144.4% YoY indicate exceptional top and bottom-line expansion.
Gross margin of 76.0% and profit margin of 26.7% demonstrate strong profitability.
Return on equity of 21.1% and return on assets of 10.1% show efficient use of capital.
Strong analyst consensus of 'buy' with a high number of ratings.
Current ratio of 11.30 and quick ratio of 10.55 indicate excellent short-term liquidity.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 217.46 and forward P/E of 75.99 are extremely high, suggesting a very rich valuation.
Price/Sales (TTM) of 54.71 is also exceptionally high.
Debt/Equity ratio of 2.80 indicates significant leverage.
Beta of 3.36 suggests high volatility relative to the market.
Analyst mean target of $244.97 is below the current spot price of $319.85.

news.paragraph: Astera Labs has seen a significant surge in its stock price, climbing over 32% recently, with multiple analysts issuing 'bullish' ratings and discussing the stock's upward trend. This positive momentum follows a strong earnings report where the company beat estimates, and analysts are projecting robust growth for the current quarter and fiscal year. The stock's performance has been a key talking point across financial news outlets.
